files.description: Pegasus 1.5 timestamp-grounded analysis of the owned Internships.com draft against bounded job-content research hypotheses.

notes: The Apify artifact supplies research provenance; TwelveLabs analyzes only the purpose-created local draft.
The output remains an unapproved QA artifact and cannot authorize publishing.
Analyze one approximately 24-second owned draft under a pre-call estimate of 0.05 USD.
No hosted index, competitor-media ingestion, or social publishing is included.
